name: PCA6416A I/O Expander
description: The PCA6416A component allows you to use **PCA6416A** or **PCAL6416A** I/O expanders in ESPHome. It uses [I²C Bus](https://esphome.io/components/i2c) for communication.

config_entries.label: Address
config_entries.description: The I²C address of the driver. Defaults to `0x20`.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: The id to use for this `pca6416a` component.

config_entries.label: Interrupt Pin
config_entries.description: The pin connected to the INT output of the PCA6416A/PCAL6416A. When configured, the component becomes interrupt-driven instead of polling — it only reads the chip when a pin actually changes state, significantly reducing I²C bus traffic and CPU usage. The INT pin is active-low and open-drain, so an external or internal pull-up resistor is required. Must be an internal GPIO pin (not another expander pin).

config_entries.label: Mode
config_entries.description: Pin mode flags (input / output / pullup / pulldown / open_drain). Combine flags as needed — e.g. input + pullup for a button pulled to VCC.

config_entries.label: Open Drain
config_entries.description: Set the open drain mode flag.

config_entries.label: Inverted
config_entries.description: Invert the logical level. ``true`` swaps high/low in software so an active-low button reads as active when grounded.
